disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Bleeding is unilateral (right nostril only) and began immediately after vigorous nose-blowing
trigger_question_examples: Is the bleeding coming from one nostril or both?
What were you doing right when it started?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's only coming from my right nostril. It started right after I blew my nose really hard because it was all blocked up.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Patient is using incorrect first aid — tilting head back and pinching the bony bridge, swallowing blood and feeling nauseous
trigger_question_examples: Show me exactly how you're trying to stop it — where are you pinching and which way is your head?
Are you leaning forward or back, and are you pinching the soft part or the hard top of your nose?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've been leaning my head back and pinching the hard bit at the top of my nose. A lot of blood has gone down my throat and it's making me feel sick.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I'm just holding a towel to it and trying to stop it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No anticoagulant or antiplatelet use, no personal or family bleeding disorder, no easy bruising
trigger_question_examples: Do you take any blood-thinning medicines like aspirin, warfarin or clopidogrel?
Do you bruise easily or has anyone in your family had a bleeding problem?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I don't take anything like that. No aspirin, nothing. I've never had bleeding problems and neither has my family.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Mild light-headedness and situational anxiety; no true presyncope, no feeling faint on standing, bleeding now slowing
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel faint, dizzy, or like you might pass out?
How are you feeling in yourself apart from the bleeding?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel a bit shaky and anxious, but I don't feel like I'm going to pass out. The bleeding is actually slowing down a bit now.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No trauma; occurs on a background of allergic rhinitis and dry heated indoor air
trigger_question_examples: Did you knock or injure your nose at all?
Has your nose been irritated, blocked or itchy lately?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No injury. My nose has been blocked and itchy from hay fever, and the heater's been running hot and drying everything out.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Patient lives alone with no one present to help
trigger_question_examples: Is there anyone at home with you right now?
Do you live with anyone who could help if you needed it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I live on my own. There's no one else here.
